task.description: What to do with the UI

target.description: Component, page, or app under work (e.g. 'pricing page', 'navbar')

stack.description: Tech stack, e.g. react, next, vue, svelte, swiftui, react-native, flutter, tailwind, shadcn, html-css

style.description: Visual style, e.g. glassmorphism, brutalism, minimalism, dark-mode

design_or_code.description: Design guidance or implementation code for the requested stack, honoring style, accessibility, and brand rules
